summary: The diff shows PDFScanner.tsx has been substantially rewritten to implement the requested scan-to-PDF workflow. The file includes types for ScannedPage, PageAdjustments, CropRegion, helpers for applyAdjustmentsToCanvas and autoDetectCrop, and imports for relevant UI components. However, the diff is truncated at ~4000 chars, so only partial implementation is visible. Based on what is visible, most requirements appear to be addressed at the code structure level, but several acceptance criteria cannot be fully confirmed due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-74: In Manual Crop mode, an interactive overlay with draggable corner handles is shown on the image.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff is truncated before the JSX/render section of PDFScanner.tsx. The autoDetectCrop helper is present, but draggable corner handles for manual crop mode cannot be verified from the available diff content.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-74: A toggle or radio control allows switching between Auto Crop and Manual Crop modes.
missing_requirements.reason: The CropMode type ('auto' | 'manual') is defined, but the actual toggle/radio UI control in the render section is not visible due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-73: On mobile, the button label reads 'Choose from Files (Google Files / Scanner)'.
missing_requirements.reason: The render/JSX section is not visible due to truncation. Cannot confirm mobile-specific label logic is implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-77: pdf-lib is loaded from CDN following the same pattern used in usePDFOperations.ts.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff is truncated and the CDN-load pattern for pdf-lib cannot be confirmed. The import section shows no static pdf-lib import, but the CDN dynamic load logic is not visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-73: PDF.js is loaded from CDN for rendering PDF pages, following the same pattern as usePDFOperations.ts.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff is truncated and the CDN-load pattern for PDF.js cannot be confirmed in the visible portion of the file.
